name: Abstaining Support-Mass Attention Write
single_primitive: factor history attention into real-event mass rho and conditional allocation p, use zero-valued null mass 1-rho, then write through V/W_O
exact_reduction: for every subprobability vector w=rho p, softmax over real events plus a zero-value NULL realizes the same weights and output; the inverse map is rho=sum(real weights), p=w/rho
jacobian_reduction: radial support and tangent allocation Jacobians equal null-softmax under a differentiable coordinate transform
alternative_reductions: ordinary attention times per-head scalar sigmoid gate
sparsemax/entmax when exact zeros are required
no_history_contract: all mass on zero NULL and bitwise selection of untouched base score
post_write_contract: candidate centering and global hidden bound
exact_contract: canonical exact recurrence remains one coordinate inside the same monotone head
